description_long: This is a large, four-door pickup truck with a robust and boxy design, featuring a light gray body and black lower trim. The vehicle has prominent wheel arches, chrome-accented wheels, and tinted windows, giving it a modern and utilitarian appearance. The front grille is wide and horizontal, with a recognizable Chevrolet bowtie emblem at the center, and the headlights are integrated into the front fascia. The rear of the truck is squared off, with simple taillights and a solid tailgate, lacking an exposed cargo bed. The side mirrors are mounted on the doors, and the door handles are flush with the body. The overall build suggests a focus on durability and urban utility, suitable for both passenger and light cargo transport.
description: A large, four-door, light gray pickup truck with black trim, chrome wheels, and a solid rear section, featuring Chevrolet styling cues.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black lower trim, two passenger doors, and chrome wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide grille, Chevrolet emblem, and integrated headlights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with four doors visible, chrome wheels, and a continuous gray body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid tailgate, simple taillights, and no visible cargo bed.
